description_long: This is a modern, two-seater couch with a boxy silhouette and clean lines, upholstered in a smooth, black material that appears to be either leather or faux leather. The couch features two large, plush seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which are slightly overstuffed for comfort. The armrests are wide, straight, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the piece a monolithic and contemporary appearance. The base of the couch is not visibly elevated, suggesting that the legs are either very short or completely hidden from view. The upholstery is solid black with a subtle sheen, and there are no visible decorative patterns, tufting, or accent pillows. This couch would be suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern outdoor patios.
description: A sleek, black, two-seater couch with wide, straight armrests and plush seat and back cushions. The upholstery is smooth and solid, with a contemporary, boxy design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the couch, the thickness of the armrest, and the profile of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the solid, uninterrupted backrest and the full width of the couch.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same armrest and cushion profile visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying both seat and back cushions, the wide armrests, and the inviting seating area.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching loose backrest cushions, all rectangular and evenly spaced, with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black upholstery with a smooth, slightly glossy finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed base with no exposed design elements.
attribute_armrest_design: Wide, straight armrests that are the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, monolithic appearance and no visible padding or contouring.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight backrest with two large, loose cushions, continuous across the width of the couch, and no visible tufting or division beyond the cushion separation.
